base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of world_1_1_layout — a tile (level_layout) from 1985 super mario bros. World 1-1 (Overworld) — surface segment with mountains/hills/clouds/?-blocks/brick rows/pipes/flagpole/castle. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: World 1-1 (Overworld) — surface segment with mountains/hills/clouds/?-blocks/brick rows/pipes/flagpole/castle; underground coin-bonus room visible beneath surface at mid-level (reached via pipe). Tutorial stage: first Goomba ~200px in, first ?-block ~240px, first pipe ~500px, first Koopa ~900px, stair-climb-to-flag at ~3200px.
